articles.headline: World Cup final squads ranked: Of all 48 national teams, who can win this summer?
articles.description: We have the final 26-player squads that can win the FIFA World Cup, so let's go through all 48 teams and rank where they stand.

season.name: 2026 World Cup Qualifying - Concacaf, Second Round

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Goal!  Puerto Rico 1, Anguilla 0. Jeremy de León (Puerto Rico) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Puerto Rico 2, Anguilla 0. Roberto Ydrach (Puerto Rico) right footed shot from very close range to the top left corner. Assisted by Leandro Antonetti with a headed pass.
Penalty saved. Jordan Deans (Anguilla)  left footed shot saved  in the bottom right corner.
Varian Carty (Anguilla) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Second Half begins Puerto Rico 2, Anguilla 0.
Goal!  Puerto Rico 3, Anguilla 0. Wilfredo Rivera (Puerto Rico) left footed shot from outside the box to the top left corner. Assisted by Jeremy de León.
Goal!  Puerto Rico 4, Anguilla 0. Jeremy de León (Puerto Rico) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner.
Substitution, Puerto Rico. Ricardo Rivera replaces Gerald Díaz.
Substitution, Puerto Rico. Darren Ríos replaces Colby Quiñónes.
Goal!  Puerto Rico 5, Anguilla 0. Leandro Antonetti (Puerto Rico) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ricardo Rivera with a through ball.
Substitution, Anguilla. Jared Smeins replaces Kyle Lake-Bryan.
Goal!  Puerto Rico 6, Anguilla 0. Wilfredo Rivera (Puerto Rico) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner.
Goal!  Puerto Rico 7, Anguilla 0. Darren Ríos (Puerto Rico) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Nicolás Cardona with a cross.
Substitution, Anguilla. Jayvon Lloyd replaces Varian Carty.
Substitution, Anguilla. Stewart Murray replaces Jordan Deans.
Penalty missed! Still  Puerto Rico 7, Anguilla 0. Leandro Antonetti (Puerto Rico) hits the left post with a left footed shot.
Substitution, Puerto Rico. Noeh Hernández replaces Isaac Angking.
Substitution, Puerto Rico. Jaden Servania replaces Jeremy de León.
Substitution, Puerto Rico. Adrián Biaggi replaces Roberto Ydrach.
Substitution, Anguilla. Kemari Gumbs replaces Lamar Carpenter.
Substitution, Anguilla. Nicholson Millington replaces Mekhi Connor.
Goal!  Puerto Rico 8, Anguilla 0. Nicolás Cardona (Puerto Rico) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal    following a set piece situation.
Wilfredo Rivera (Puerto Rico) is shown the yellow card.
